artists.name: Anthony Saunders
artists.description: Aviation artist specialising in WWII military scenes, particularly Battle of Britain and Dambusters subjects.

artists.name: James Dietz
artists.description: Through his meticulous attention to detail and historical accuracy, James Dietz creates compelling images of the men and machinery that have shaped our century; recreating moments out of history and bringing to life stories from the past.

artists.name: Keith Burns
artists.description: Award-winning artist specialising in WWII aviation scenes.

artists.name: Philip E West
artists.description: Known for stunning depictions of WWII aircraft including Spitfires, Lancasters, and Concorde.

artists.name: Richard Taylor
artists.description: Aviation artist known for Red Arrows, Battle of Britain, and WWII subjects. Creates magnificent triptychs and limited edition prints.

artists.name: Robert Taylor
artists.description: One of the world's most collected aviation artists. Known for iconic WWII aviation art including Spitfires, Lancasters, and Halifax bombers.

artists.name: Simon Atack
artists.description: Born in 1957 into a successful musical family. After formal training at Wakefield College of Art, Simon joined the RAF where his talents were quickly recognised. Better known for his military aircraft paintings, Simon is also a talented artist who enjoys painting a variety of other subjects.

artists.name: Colin Carter
artists.description: Known for dramatic motorsport art covering F1, Le Mans, and motorcycle racing.

artists.name: Ray Goldsbrough
artists.description: Prolific motorsport artist covering F1, MotoGP, and historic racing. Known for editions celebrating drivers like Hamilton, Verstappen, Rossi, Lauda, and Senna.

artists.name: Rod Organ
artists.description: 1947-2007. Prolific motorsport artist with 25+ prints covering MotoGP and motor racing.

artists.name: Aldo Balding
artists.description: Born and raised in the United Kingdom and currently lives in the South of France. Started off his career as an illustrator before making the move to France to become a full-time artist.

artists.name: Emma Rose
artists.description: Award winning contemporary artist based near Bath in South West England. Specialising in semi abstract and impressionist painting with an emphasis on colour and texture.
